COS string primitive now ported with text/hex behavior and visitor support.

COSUpdateState ported with recursive origin propagation for dictionaries, arrays, and dereferenced COSObject wrappers.
Mechanical port of COS parser interface; direct interface mapping with no Java-only dependencies.
Visitor coverage now includes primitive, container, name/string, object, and stream COS foundation types.
Updated to full table-driven upstream PDFDocEncoding mapping parity.
Read-only mutation guards now enforce behavior through virtual overrides, matching Java polymorphic dispatch expectations.

LRU-cached file-backed RandomAccessRead; Java ByteBuffer/FileChannel adapted to FileStream+byte-array page cache.

File-backed page-handler implementing RandomAccessStreamCache; replaces in-memory-only StreamCache when useTempFile=true in MemoryUsageSetting.
Page-based RandomAccess implementation backed by ScratchFile.

Implemented soft mask dictionary parsing and initial CTM capture support.
Added text knockout flag state used by ExtGState TK mapping.
Open/load/save lifecycle expanded with page operations and version behavior over the COS parser/writer bridge; full PDF object/xref parsing and broader feature parity deferred.
Catalog expanded with PageLayout, PageMode, Language getters/setters; high-fanout catalog features (AcroForm, ViewerPreferences, Outlines, etc.) remain deferred.
String-based metadata, date (CreationDate/ModDate) and trapped fields all ported; full upstream Java Calendar->DateTimeOffset parity tested.
Expanded with MediaBox, CropBox, BleedBox, TrimBox, ArtBox, Rotation, StructParents, HasContents; content stream/resources/annotations/actions remain deferred.
Expanded with GetInheritableAttribute static method and bad-PDF repair (Page-instead-of-Pages root); multi-level deep-tree traversal deferred.
PageLayout enum and string-value helpers ported one-to-one.
PageMode enum and string-value helpers ported one-to-one.
Removed replaced PDLineDashPattern/PDSoftMask/PDFormXObject/PDTransparencyGroup stubs after real implementations landed.
Added ExtGState and typed XObject lookup helpers for gs/Do processing.
Low-level parser subset ported for token/object flow (comments, names, strings, arrays, dictionaries, booleans, null, numbers); broader parser orchestration remains out of chunk-2 scope.
First pdfwriter slice: output stream wrapper with position tracking and newline-format helper methods.
COSWriter now implements ICOSVisitor; Write(COSBase?) routes through visitor dispatch. VisitFromDocument is a no-op for low-level serializer scope.
First pdfbox utility leaf port used to seed the wider pdfbox conversion backlog.
Focused test coverage for COS containers/streams plus visitor completeness and serialization roundtrip interactions.
Upstream COSDictionaryTest converted to xUnit.
Focused tests validate document/update-state propagation and COSIncrement collection for updated direct and indirect children.
Core COSObjectKey unit coverage is converted; fixture-driven PDFBOX-5742 integration scenario is deferred outside primitive/container scope.
Focused xUnit coverage for new COS leaf primitives and interfaces.
Native test added for issue #29: fixture-driven COS regression scenarios for deterministic minimal/roundtrip parsing and malformed-input parser stability.
Focused xUnit coverage for COSStandardOutputStream position and line ending behavior.
Native test added for issue #28: visitor dispatch across all COS types, mixed object graph traversal, ICOSVisitor serialization path through COSWriter, and deterministic output fixtures.
Extended content-stream engine tests with form XObject traversal through Do operator.
Upstream EncodingTest converted to xUnit with extra BuiltInEncoding fallback/read-only map assertions.
Added .NET encryption baseline tests for AccessPermission, PDEncryption, and StandardSecurityHandler instantiation.
Filter roundtrip and factory lookup tests added for .NET port scope.
Expanded font replacement tests for width arrays, ToUnicode CMap decoding, descriptor metrics, and Standard14 mapping.
